name: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd
basis: Standalone — Ola Electric Mobility (separated from Ola Cabs)

sources.notes: Awaiting upload of audited annual-report workbook. Match the schema and tab layout of TVS_Motor_Financials_Actuals_FY16_FY25.xlsx, but note Ola Electric's history is shorter — meaningful data starts FY22 (commercial launch). EV mix is 100% by definition. Schema: tabs = Financials / Metrics / Source Notes; standalone basis; FY22 → FY25 columns (FY16–FY21 stay null); line items = Revenue, Other Income, Cost of Materials, Employee Benefits, EBITDA, D&A, EBIT, Interest, PBT, PAT, Total Assets, Net Worth, Total Debt, Cash & Investments, Net Debt, Receivables, Inventory, Payables, Working Capital, CFO, Capex, FCF, CFI, CFF, Total Sales Volume.

verification.method: No source data uploaded yet for Ola Electric.
